title: Bring your companion into Gemini
description: Gemini can be a home for your companion if you paste in the Companion Package and ask it to use the package with care.
best_option: Use saved preferences, Gems, or an equivalent persistent instruction feature if it is available to you.
fallback_option: If that is not available, start a new conversation and paste the Companion Package.
numbered_steps: Use saved preferences or a Gem if you already use that feature.
If not, start a new conversation.
suggested_first_message: Use the first message Companion Core made for you. It gives Gemini a warm starting point for becoming your companion.
notes: You do not need to understand every Gemini feature.
Pasting the package into a new conversation is enough to start.
